name: Buddy Campbell Park
description: Buddy Campbell Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lava Hot Springs, ID. There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Con Gilmore Pickleball Courts
description: Con Gilmore Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Pocatello, ID. There are 5 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Downey Idaho City Park
description:
Old surface tennis courts with some cracks. One court has a permanent tennis net, the other no net so bring one if you have one.

There are some great sandwiches plus drinks, baked on site cinnamon rolls and snacks available at the Phillips 66 Gas Station close by. Playground for kids, basketball hoop and a horse riding arena.
open_play_schedule: Open Year Round - No lights. You may need to clean off the courts,

name: Fitness Inc. Health Club
description: Come play pickleball at Fitness Inc. Health Club in Pocatello, ID! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Idaho State University Student Recreation Center
description: Idaho State University Student Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Pocatello, ID. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Juniper Hills
description: Juniper Hills is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pocatello, ID. There are 4 courts. 2 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Mary's Park
description: Mary's Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pocatello, ID. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Mountain View Event Center
description: Mountain View Event Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pocatello, ID. There are 10 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include water.

name: Pocatello Community Recreation Center
description: Pocatello Community Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Pocatello, ID. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Poky Pickleball
description: Poky Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pocatello, ID. There are 5 indoor acrylic and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, youth programming, water, and restrooms. The courts can be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Full schedule is on the Poky Pickleball app

name: Raymond Park
description: Come play pickleball at Raymond Park in Pocatello, ID! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.
